resources.string: Iridescent fire freezes the hand as space folds behind it.

The parchment crawls. Letters shed their meanings and sprout new limbs. A cold flame burns upward and downward at once, ruins float in broken orbit, and the hourglass remembers tomorrow before yesterday. Natural law was only a timid contract signed by frightened minds. Tear the curtain. Laugh at the code beneath it. Reality is most honest when it is being rewritten.
